hooks.command: cd /Users/augustinduret/Lab-Ai-Finance/lab-ai-finance && git add -A 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --quiet || { FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only | sed 's|.*/||' | head -5 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//'); git commit -m "update: ${FILES:-changements}" && git push origin main; } 2>/dev/null; true
